# Cubex Construct

## Observed Stats

- **HP**: 70 on A10.

## Observed Moves

- **Empower**: gains 2 Strength.
- **Aggressive + Empower**: attacks once while gaining 2 Strength.
- **Aggressive**: attacks multiple times after scaling.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Treat paired Cubex Constructs as a scaling damage check; they can reach 12x2 each by turn 4 after repeated Empower turns.
- Potion of Binding is worth spending if it both enables a kill through Vulnerable and prevents lethal multi-hit damage.
